name: Can outdated content hurt AI SEO?
description: Yes. Stale content can reduce trust and lead to inaccurate AI answers. Keep pricing, service details, and key facts current.

mainEntity.name: Can outdated content hurt AI SEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if the content is not current, because AI systems and users both react badly to stale information. Up-to-date pricing, services, and key facts matter because AI models may prefer timely content and can misrepresent old details.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes. Stale content can reduce trust and lead to inaccurate AI answers. Keep pricing, service details, and key facts current.
